top_signals.title: Power Firms Jump on Data-Center Timeline From Biggest US Grid
top_signals.summary: Utility stocks are climbing after the largest power grid in the US accelerated plans to pair data centers with energy producers to feed the demands of artificial intelligence development.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Here's how Nvidia has traded each of the last 16 quarters
top_signals.summary: Options pricing has overestimated the size of Nvidia's post-report swing six of the past seven quarters, and 14 of the past 20, according to Cboe LiveVol data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Jeff Bezos says there is ‘no truth’ to the ‘buy borrow die’ tax strategy
top_signals.summary: The "buy, borrow, die" strategy refers to the practice of wealthy founders or investors borrowing against their assets and using the loan proceeds as income.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
